allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/v1/health" -TimeoutSec 5; $r | ConvertTo-Json -Compress } catch { "Health check failed: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(node -e "const prisma = require\('./src/utils/prisma'\); prisma.user.delete\({ where: { username: 'storytest_e2e' } }\).then\(\(\) => { console.log\('Deleted test user'\); process.exit\(0\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\(e.message\); process.exit\(1\); }\);")

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/" -TimeoutSec 60 -UseBasicParsing; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; if \($r.Content -match "__next_error__|Unhandled Runtime Error|Failed to compile"\) { "COMPILE ERROR DETECTED" } else { "No compile error markers in HTML" } } catch { "Request failed: $\($_.Exception.Message\) | Status: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/v1/health" -TimeoutSec 5; "Backend OK: $\($r.message\)" } catch { "Health check failed: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(node -e "const prisma = require\('./src/utils/prisma'\); prisma.user.delete\({ where: { username: 'storytest_text' } }\).then\(\(\) => { console.log\('Deleted test user'\); process.exit\(0\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\(e.message\); process.exit\(1\); }\);")

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/" -TimeoutSec 60 -UseBasicParsing; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; if \($r.Content -match "__next_error__|Unhandled Runtime Error|Failed to compile"\) { "COMPILE ERROR DETECTED" } else { "No compile error markers" } } catch { "Request failed: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($child = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name = 'node.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'node\\.exe" src.index\\.js' }; if \($child\) { $child | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force -Confirm:$false; "Stopped PID $\($_.ProcessId\)" } } else { "No backend child found" }; npx prisma migrate dev --name add_email_verification)

PowerShell(node -e "const prisma = require\('./src/utils/prisma'\); prisma.user.updateMany\({ data: { emailVerified: true } }\).then\(r => { console.log\('Backfilled ' + r.count + ' existing users to emailVerified=true'\); process.exit\(0\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\(e.message\); process.exit\(1\); }\);")
PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/v1/health" -TimeoutSec 5; "Backend OK" } catch { "Health check failed: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const nodemailer = require\('nodemailer'\); const t = nodemailer.createTransport\({ service: 'gmail', auth: { user: process.env.GMAIL_USER, pass: process.env.GMAIL_PASS } }\); t.verify\(\).then\(\(\) => { console.log\('SMTP OK - Gmail credentials hop le'\); process.exit\(0\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\('SMTP FAILED: ' + e.message\); process.exit\(1\); }\);")

PowerShell(node -e "const p = require\('./src/utils/prisma'\); p.user.delete\({ where: { username: 'verifytest_e2e' } }\).then\(\(\) => { console.log\('Deleted test user'\); process.exit\(0\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\(e.message\); process.exit\(1\); }\);")

PowerShell($pages = @\("/verify-email?token=abc", "/reset-password?token=abc", "/forgot-password", "/login", "/register"\); foreach \($p in $pages\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000$p" -TimeoutSec 60 -UseBasicParsing; $err = if \($r.Content -match "__next_error__|Failed to compile"\) { "COMPILE ERROR" } else { "OK" }; "$p -> $\($r.StatusCode\) $err" } catch { "$p -> FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($child = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name = 'node.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'node\\.exe" src.index\\.js' }; if \($child\) { $child | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force -Confirm:$false; "Stopped PID $\($_.ProcessId\)" } } else { "No backend child found" }; npx prisma migrate dev --name add_user_role)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/v1/health" -TimeoutSec 5 | Out-Null; "Backend OK" } catch { "Health check failed: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(node -e "const { requireAdmin } = require\('./src/middlewares/auth.middleware'\); function test\(user\) { let result = null; const req = { user }; const res = { status\(c\) { this.code = c; return this; }, json\(o\) { result = Object.assign\({ code: this.code }, o\); } }; let nextCalled = false; requireAdmin\(req, res, \(\) => { nextCalled = true; }\); return nextCalled ? 'NEXT \(cho qua\)' : \('BLOCKED ' + result.code + ': ' + result.message\); } console.log\('role ADMIN  ->', test\({ role: 'ADMIN' }\)\); console.log\('role USER   ->', test\({ role: 'USER' }\)\); console.log\('khong login ->', test\(undefined\)\);")

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/login" -TimeoutSec 60 -UseBasicParsing; if \($r.Content -match "__next_error__|Failed to compile"\) { "COMPILE ERROR" } else { "Status $\($r.StatusCode\) - OK" } } catch { "FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const ai = require\('./src/modules/ai/ai.service'\); \(async \(\) => { console.log\('--- generateCaption ---'\); const caps = await ai.generateCaption\('du lich Da Lat', 'friendly'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(caps, null, 1\)\); console.log\('--- suggestHashtags ---'\); const tags = await ai.suggestHashtags\('Cuoi tuan di ca phe voi ban be o Sai Gon'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(tags\)\); console.log\('--- moderateContent \(sach\) ---'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(await ai.moderateContent\('Hom nay troi dep qua, di dao pho thoi!'\)\)\); console.log\('--- moderateContent \(xau\) ---'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(await ai.moderateContent\('Thang ngu nay, may di chet di do rac ruoi'\)\)\); process.exit\(0\); }\)\(\).catch\(e => { console.error\('FATAL: ' + e.message\); process.exit\(1\); }\);")

PowerShell(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); fetch\('https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models?key=' + process.env.GEMINI_API_KEY\).then\(r => r.json\(\)\).then\(d => { const models = \(d.models || []\).filter\(m => \(m.supportedGenerationMethods || []\).includes\('generateContent'\)\).map\(m => m.name.replace\('models/', ''\)\); console.log\(models.join\('\\n'\)\); process.exit\(0\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\(e.message\); process.exit\(1\); }\);")
Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('next', p.dependencies.next\); console.log\('emoji-picker-react', p.dependencies['emoji-picker-react'] || 'NOT INSTALLED'\)")
Bash(node -e "const m=require\('emoji-picker-react'\); console.log\('default:', typeof m.default\); console.log\('keys:', Object.keys\(m\).slice\(0,12\).join\(', '\)\)")
